(DEVICE FILE: MCP2515_0_TSSOP_20_MCP2515-IST - used for device: 'MCP2515_0_TSSOP_20_MCP2515-I/ST')

PACKAGE TSSOP_20
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 20

PINORDER 'MCP2515_0_TSSOP_20_MCP2515-I/ST' CLKOUT/SOF GND MISO MOSI NC1 NC2 OSC1 OSC2 RX_CAN SCK,
      TX_CAN VCC '\\C\S\' '\\I\N\T\' '\\R\E\S\E\T\' '\\R\X\0\B\F\' '\\R\X\1\B\F\' '\\T\X\0\R\T\S\',
      '\\T\X\1\R\T\S\' '\\T\X\2\R\T\S\'
FUNCTION G1 'MCP2515_0_TSSOP_20_MCP2515-I/ST' 3 10 17 16 6 15 9 8 2 14 1 20 18 13 19 12 11 4 5 7

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME MCP2515_0
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 'MCP2515-I/ST'

END
